channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KERNEX] Kernex Microsystems India Ltd Enters Joint Venture with Bharat Heavy Engineering Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kernex Microsystems India Ltd has entered into a Joint Venture Agreement with Bharat Heavy Engineering Private Limited. The purpose of this agreement is to develop a Moving Block System integrated with ATS and ATO on the Kavach platform and CTC. Kernex Microsystems (India) will hold 51% of the proposed joint venture, while Bharat Heavy Engineering Private Limited will hold 49%. There are no special rights, restrictions, or liabilities imposed on the listed entity. The joint venture does not involve any related party transactions or potential conflicts of interest.

  • Kernex Microsystems India Ltd has entered a Joint Venture Agreement with Bharat Heavy Engineering Private Limited.
  • The purpose of the agreement is to develop a Moving Block System integrated with ATS and ATO on the Kavach platform and CTC.
  • Kernex Microsystems (India) will hold 51% of the proposed joint venture, while Bharat Heavy Engineering Private Limited will hold 49%.
  • There are no special rights, restrictions, or liabilities imposed on the listed entity.
  • The joint venture does not involve any related party transactions or potential conflicts of interest.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KERNEX MICROSYSTEMS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [CUB] City Union Bank Ltd Enters Quadripartite MoU for Centre of Excellence in Artificial Intelligence for Banking
item.description:
City Union Bank Ltd has entered into a quadripartite Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Centific Global Solutions Inc, SASTRA University, and nStore Retech Pvt Ltd for the establishment of a Centre of Excellence in Artificial Intelligence for Banking (CoE/AIDF). The CoE/AIDF aims to develop and deploy AI-driven solutions for banking applications, support digital transformation initiatives, and develop industry-ready talent in AI for Banking. The Bank will participate as a Business Partner, providing domain expertise and industry insights.

  • City Union Bank Ltd has entered into a quadripartite MoU for the establishment of a Centre of Excellence in Artificial Intelligence for Banking.
  • The CoE/AIDF aims to develop and deploy AI-driven solutions for banking applications including Fraud Detection, Credit Risk Analytics, Customer Behaviour Modelling and Regulatory Compliance Automation.
  • The CoE/AIDF will support the ongoing digital transformation initiatives of City Union Bank.
  • The CoE/AIDF will develop industry-ready talent in AI for Banking through academic programs, internships and certification courses.
  • City Union Bank will participate in the initiative as a Business Partner, providing domain expertise, industry insights and support for the development and testing of AI-based solutions relevant to banking operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CITY UNION BANK LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [VIKRAMSOLR] Vikram Solar Ltd. Board Meeting and Trading Window Closure Notice
item.description:
Vikram Solar Ltd. has announced a Board Meeting to be held on March 11, 2026, to discuss various business divisions and other matters. The trading window for the company's securities will be closed from March 11, 2026, to March 13, 2026, in accordance with the company's 'Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading'. The notice is available on the company's website.

  • A Board Meeting of Vikram Solar Ltd. is scheduled for March 11, 2026, to discuss various business divisions and other matters.
  • The trading window for the company's securities will be closed from March 11, 2026, to March 13, 2026, as per the company's insider trading prevention code.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vikram Solar Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAILTEL] RailTel Corporation of India Ltd Receives Order Worth INR 26,72,60,140 from South East Central Railway
item.description:
🔥 Trending

RailTel Corporation of India Ltd has announced that it has received a Letter of Acceptance (LoA) from South East Central Railway. The order, worth INR 26,72,60,140, involves supply, transportation, trenching, laying, backfilling, Horizontal directional drilling, HDPE pipe insertion, blowing, jointing & termination of OFC. The order is domestic in nature and is to be executed by 05-MAR-27.

  • RailTel Corporation of India Ltd has received a Letter of Acceptance (LoA) from South East Central Railway.
  • The order is worth INR 26,72,60,140.
  • The order involves supply, transportation, trenching, laying, backfilling, Horizontal directional drilling, HDPE pipe insertion, blowing, jointing & termination of OFC.
  • The order is domestic in nature and is to be executed by 05-MAR-27.
  • This issues with the approval of ED/WR and is a computer-generated advice.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [JAYANT] Jayant Infratech to Raise Funds Through Equity Shares or Other Eligible Securities
item.description:
Jayant Infratech Ltd. has announced a Board of Directors meeting on March 11, 2026, to consider and approve the raising of funds through the issuance of equity shares and/or other eligible securities, including warrants or any combination thereof. The decision is subject to the approval of the members of the Company and other necessary regulatory and/or statutory approvals.

  • Jayant Infratech Ltd. plans to raise funds through equity shares and/or other eligible securities
  • The fundraising decision is subject to approval by the members of the Company and required regulatory and/or statutory approvals
  • The proposed meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled for March 11, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jayant Infratech Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [CPML] City Pulse Multiventures Ltd Adjourns Board Meeting to Consider Bonus Shares Issuance and Equity Shares Split
item.description:
City Pulse Multiventures Ltd, headquartered in Ahmedabad, has announced the adjournment of its scheduled Board of Directors meeting on 07th March 2026. The new meeting date is 18th March 2026. The company aims to discuss and approve important agenda items, including the proposal for issuing bonus shares, considering the sub-division or split of the company's equity shares, and addressing other business matters.

  • City Pulse Multiventures Ltd adjourns Board Meeting to 18th March 2026
  • Planned discussion on issuing bonus shares
  • Consideration of equity shares split or sub-division
  • Addressing other pending business matters

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: City Pulse Multiplex Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VIKRAMSOLR] Vikram Solar Ltd Board Meeting on March 11, 2026 to Review Business Divisions
item.description:
Vikram Solar Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on March 11, 2026. The agenda includes reviewing various business divisions and other matters. The trading window for the company's securities will be closed from the meeting date until 48 hours after the unpublished price sensitive information is submitted to the Stock Exchanges, in accordance with the company’s ‘Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading’.

  • Vikram Solar Ltd Board Meeting scheduled on March 11, 2026
  • Meeting to review various business divisions and other matters
  • Trading window for company's securities to close till March 13, 2026
  • Closure in accordance with the company’s ‘Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading’

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vikram Solar Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PNGJL] P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd Opens New Store in Navi Mumbai
item.description:
🔥 Trending

P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd, a renowned name in the jewellery industry, has expanded its footprint with the opening of a new store under the Franchise Owned, Company Operated (‘FOCO’) Model at Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Chowk, Vashi - Turbhe Road, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra - 400703. The store was inaugurated on March 07, 2026, at around 07:00 P.M., bringing the total number of stores to 69.

  • P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd has opened a new store in Navi Mumbai.
  • The new store is operated under the Franchise Owned, Company Operated (‘FOCO’) Model.
  • The store is located at Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Chowk, Vashi - Turbhe Road, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra - 400703.
  • The store was inaugurated on March 07, 2026.
  • The total number of stores now stands at 69.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SADHNANIQ] Sadhana Nitro Chem Ltd Appoints Mrs. Sindhu Suneer Kotian as Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
Sadhana Nitro Chem Ltd has announced the appointment of Mrs. Sindhu Suneer Kotian as a Non-Executive Independent Director. The appointment is for a term of 5 years, commencing from 07 March, 2026 to 06th March, 2031, subject to the approval of shareholders. Mrs. Kotian is an Advocate with over 25 years of experience in litigation, arbitration, corporate advisory, and media and entertainment law.

  • Mrs. Sindhu Suneer Kotian appointed as Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Appointment term: 5 years, from 07 March, 2026 to 06th March, 2031
  • Mrs. Kotian is an experienced Advocate with over 25 years of experience
  • Appointment is subject to shareholders' approval
  • Mrs. Kotian specializes in litigation, arbitration, corporate advisory, and media and entertainment law

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SADHANA NITROCHEM LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SADHNANIQ] Sadhana Nitro Chem Ltd Appoints Mrs. Sindhu Suneer Kotian as Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
Sadhana Nitro Chem Ltd has announced the appointment of Mrs. Sindhu Suneer Kotian as a Non-Executive Independent Director. The appointment is for a term of 5 years, commencing from March 07, 2026, to March 06, 2031, subject to the approval of shareholders. Mrs. Kotian is an Advocate with over 25 years of experience in litigation, arbitration, corporate advisory, and media and entertainment law.

  • Appointment of Mrs. Sindhu Suneer Kotian as Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Mrs. Kotian's appointment is for a term of 5 years
  • Mrs. Kotian is an Advocate with over 25 years of experience
  • Appointment is subject to the approval of shareholders
  • Mrs. Kotian has appeared before the Supreme Court of India and several High Courts

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SADHANA NITROCHEM LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
